safety.title: Restore
safety.subtitle: Restore points and backed-up cleanups.
safety.settings.title: Safety nets
safety.settings.restorePoint.desc: Automatically creates a Windows restore point before every cleanup.
safety.settings.backup.desc: Backs up files before deletion so a run can be undone.
safety.points.title: Windows restore points
safety.points.disabled: System Restore is disabled in Windows – no restore points can be created.
safety.points.open.failed: Could not open Windows System Restore.
safety.points.delete.title: Delete restore point
safety.points.delete.body: This Windows restore point will be removed permanently. You will no longer be able to roll the system back to this state.
safety.points.delete.failed: Could not remove the restore point.
safety.points.deleteOld.title: Delete old restore points
safety.points.deleteOld.body:
{0} restore point(s) will be removed permanently. The most recent point is kept.

Do you want to continue?
safety.history.delete.title: Discard backup
safety.history.delete.body: This run's backup will be permanently deleted. Undo will no longer be possible.
safety.restore.throttled: Windows already created a restore point within the last 24 hours – no new one was added.
safety.restore.error.notSupported: System Restore is not supported on this system.
safety.restore.error.timeout: Timed out while creating the restore point.
safety.restore.error.generic: The restore point could not be created.
safety.restore.gate.title: Restore point failed
app.tagline: Honest system cleanup · Open Source · no telemetry
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Appearance, language and license in one place.
settings.appearance.micaUnsupported: Not available on this Windows version
settings.language.heading: LANGUAGE
settings.language.hint: Language of the user interface. Changes apply instantly.
dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: An honest look at your system – real measurements only.
score.explanation.clean: No measurable issues found – all clear.
reco.reclaimable.title: {0} reclaimable
reco.reclaimable.text: {0} temporary files / caches can be freed up.
reco.driveFull.title: Drive {0} is {1} % full
reco.driveFull.text: Only {0} left free. Cleaning frees space instantly.
reco.startup.title: {0} startup programs active
reco.startup.textHigh: {0} of them with high impact – disabling can speed up startup.
reco.startup.textMany: Many programs start with Windows – check what you really need.
reco.ram.title: High RAM usage ({0} %)
reco.ram.text: Information only: close programs you don't need. OpenClean does not "free" memory.
reco.allGood.title: All clear
reco.allGood.text: No measurable issues found. Your system is clean and well utilized.
reco.startup.text: Shorten boot time — {0} programs with high startup impact.
system.title: Storage & RAM
system.subtitle: Detailed view – pure information, no "optimization" or "RAM booster".
system.health.title: Drive health
system.health.subtitle: Reads the SMART status locally through Windows – informational only, nothing is changed.
system.health.detailsLocked: The individual readings (temperature, lifespan, power-on hours, TBW) are part of OpenClean Pro. The rating above stays free.
system.health.unavailable: Windows does not report detailed readings for this drive.
startup.title: Startup
startup.subtitle: Programs that start with Windows. Turn off what you don't need.
startup.policyTooltip: Set by group policy – cannot be toggled via OpenClean
startup.taskSchedulerNote: Note: Task Scheduler entries are not shown at this time.
startup.delay.tooltip: Start the program only after the selected time – takes load off sign-in.
startup.delay.notSupported: This entry cannot be started with a delay.
startup.delay.note: Delayed programs are started via the Windows Task Scheduler.
startup.delay.taskFailed: The scheduled task could not be created.
startup.delay.taskDescription: Delayed startup of “{0}”, set up by OpenClean.
startup.stagger.tooltip: Start enabled programs automatically one after another.
startup.stagger.confirm: {0} program(s) will be started in a staggered manner (30 sec to 10 min after sign-in). Continue?
startup.stagger.nothing: There are no enabled programs that can be delayed.
startup.error.noTaskKey: No task key known for this Store app.
startup.error.taskKeyMissing: Task key of the Store app not found.
contextmenu.title: Context menu
contextmenu.subtitle: Entries in the Windows right-click menu. Turn off what you don't need – nothing is deleted.
contextmenu.protectedTooltip: Windows core entry – OpenClean does not turn this off.
contextmenu.win11Note: Note: On Windows 11 these entries appear under “Show more options”.
contextmenu.explorerNote: Changes to shell extensions take effect after restarting Explorer.
contextmenu.error.noClsid: No CLSID is registered for this shell extension.
contextmenu.error.blockedKeyMissing: The shell extension block list is not writable.
contextmenu.error.keyMissing: The registry key of this entry was not found.
updater.title: Software updates
updater.subtitle: Update outdated programs via winget – you decide what gets updated.
updater.status.none: All programs are up to date.
updater.status.wingetMissing: winget was not found. Install the “App Installer” from the Microsoft Store to use updates.
updater.confirm.title: Confirm update
updater.confirm.single:
“{0}” will be updated from version {1} to {2}.

Do you want to continue?
updater.confirm.all:
{0} program(s) will be updated via winget.

Do you want to continue?
cleaner.title: Cleanup
cleaner.subtitle: Preview before deletion – you decide what gets removed.
cleaner.emptyPreview: No files found – traces appear here after analyzing.
cleaner.status.ready: Ready. Click “Analyze” to see what can be cleaned.
cleaner.status.doneSelectable: Analysis complete. Review the list and click “Clean”.
cleaner.status.doneEmpty: Analysis complete – nothing to clean found.
cleaner.confirm.message:
{0} object(s) totaling {1} will be permanently deleted.

Do you want to continue?
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Preview before deletion – you decide which traces are removed.
privacy.emptyPreview: No entries found – traces appear here after analyzing.
privacy.status.ready: Ready. Click “Analyze” to see which traces can be removed.
privacy.status.doneSelectable: Analysis complete. Review the list and click “Clean”.
privacy.status.doneEmpty: Analysis complete – no removable traces found.
privacy.confirm.intro: {0} entry/entries from the following categories will be permanently deleted:
privacy.confirm.cookieWarning: ⚠ WARNING: Included cookies will be removed. You will be signed out of the affected websites and must sign in again.
privacy.confirm.cookiesLocked: ⚠ NOTE: {0} is running. Cookies cannot be deleted until the browser is closed.
privacy.browserHistory.name: Browser history
privacy.browserHistory.description: Recently visited websites in Chrome, Edge, Brave and Firefox.
privacy.cookies.name: Cookies
privacy.cookies.description: Stored cookies per website – deleting ends active sign-ins.
privacy.whitelist.title: Cookie whitelist
privacy.whitelist.description: Cookies for these domains are never deleted during cleanup – you stay signed in there.
privacy.whitelist.invalid: Invalid domain. Please enter e.g. google.com.
privacy.browserCookies.title: Existing cookies
privacy.browserCookies.description: Cookies found in your browsers. Use “+” to add a domain straight to the whitelist.
privacy.browserCookies.locked: {0} is running – the cookie database is locked. Please close the browser and load again.
privacy.browserCookies.searchHint: Search by domain or cookie name …
privacy.browserCookies.shadowInfo: Read via a shadow copy because the browser is running.
privacy.recentFiles.name: Recently used files
privacy.recentFiles.description: The list of recently opened files and folders (Windows Recent).
privacy.officeMru.name: Office history
privacy.officeMru.description: Documents recently opened in Word, Excel and PowerPoint (MRU).
privacy.explorerSearch.name: Explorer search history
privacy.explorerSearch.description: Terms recently searched in File Explorer.
privacy.startMenuSearch.name: Start menu search history
privacy.startMenuSearch.description: Terms recently typed into Windows search.
privacy.clipboard.name: Clipboard
privacy.clipboard.description: The current contents of the Windows clipboard.
privacy.mediaPlayer.name: Media player history
privacy.mediaPlayer.description: Recently played media in VLC media player and Windows Media Player.
confirm.title: Confirm cleanup
cleanup.recycleBin.name: Recycle Bin
cat.windowsTemp.name: Windows Temp
cat.windowsTemp.description: Temporary files from Windows and programs (%TEMP%, C:\Windows\Temp).
cat.updateCache.name: Windows Update cache
cat.updateCache.description: Already installed update downloads (SoftwareDistribution\Download). Requires admin.
cat.thumbnails.name: Thumbnail cache
cat.chrome.name: Google Chrome
cat.chrome.description: Cached web content from Google Chrome (all profiles).
cat.edge.name: Microsoft Edge
cat.edge.description: Cached web content from Microsoft Edge (all profiles).
cat.brave.name: Brave
cat.brave.description: Cached web content from Brave (all profiles).
cat.firefox.name: Mozilla Firefox
cat.firefox.description: Cached web content from Mozilla Firefox (all profiles).
cat.inetCache.name: Internet cache (legacy/WinINet)
cat.appCache.name: App caches (AppData)
cat.appCache.description: Known cache folders of installed apps under %AppData% and %LocalAppData%.
cat.recycleBin.name: Recycle Bin
cat.recycleBin.description: Empties the Recycle Bin of all drives via the Windows shell.
sub.browserCache.name: Cache
sub.codeCache.name: Code cache
sub.userTemp.name: User temp
sub.windowsTemp.name: Windows temp
sub.thumbCache.name: Thumbnail cache
sub.iconCache.name: Icon cache
sub.files.name: Files
schedule.title: Scheduled cleanup
schedule.subtitle: Automatic cleanup on a schedule – runs via a Windows task, not a background service.
schedule.warning.title: Automatic cleanup deletes WITHOUT asking
schedule.warning.body: A scheduled run shows NO confirmation and NO preview. All items in the selected categories are permanently deleted without asking. Only enable automatic cleanup if you are comfortable with that.
schedule.enable.label: Enable automatic cleanup
schedule.enable.hint: Creates a Windows task that starts OpenClean with the highest privileges at the chosen time and cleans silently. Without enabling it, nothing is scheduled.
schedule.time.label: Time
schedule.weekday.label: Day of week
schedule.dayOfMonth.label: Day of month
schedule.profile.tempOnly.hint: Windows temp, update cache, thumbnails and internet cache – the lowest-risk scope.
schedule.profile.full.hint: All available categories including browser caches and the Recycle Bin.
schedule.profile.custom.hint: Choose yourself which categories are cleaned automatically.
schedule.notify.label: Show notification
schedule.notify.hint: Shows a brief Windows notification with the result after an automatic cleanup.
schedule.reportsave.label: Save reports
schedule.reportsave.hint: Saves a report after every automatic run (history in the UI and a text log) in the data directory.
schedule.reportsave.retention.label: Retention
schedule.reports.heading: Reports
schedule.reports.empty: No automatic cleanup has run yet.
schedule.report.truncated: Only the first entries are saved – more items were deleted than listed here.
schedule.status.registered: Automatic cleanup is active (scheduled Windows task created).
schedule.status.disabled: Automatic cleanup disabled – scheduled task removed.
schedule.status.error: The scheduled task could not be changed. Is OpenClean running as administrator?
schedule.status.runError: The cleanup run could not be completed. Please try again.
schedule.runNow.confirm:
The cleanup will now run with the selected profile and permanently delete the items found – with no further preview.

Do you want to continue?
schedule.runNow.title: Clean now
schedule.toast.title: OpenClean – cleanup complete
uninstall.title: Uninstall
uninstall.subtitle: Thoroughly remove installed programs – with size, batch uninstall and leftover cleanup.
uninstall.sort.name: Name
uninstall.confirm.title: Confirm uninstall
uninstall.confirm.single:
“{0}” will be uninstalled. The vendor's uninstaller will be started.

Do you want to continue?
uninstall.confirm.batch:
{0} program(s) will be uninstalled one after another – silently where possible.

Do you want to continue?
uninstall.leftover.heading: Leftovers of {0} found
uninstall.leftover.hint: These folders and registry keys remained. Review the selection – nothing is deleted until you confirm.
uninstall.leftover.confirm:
{0} leftover(s) totaling {1} will be permanently deleted.

Do you want to continue?
duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.subtitle: Find exact duplicates (SHA-256) and safely remove redundant copies
duplicates.folders.heading: FOLDERS TO SCAN
duplicates.folders.empty: No folders selected yet – use “Add folder” to add one or more folders.
duplicates.autoselect.label: Automatic selection:
duplicates.groups.heading: DUPLICATE GROUPS
duplicates.compare.heading: COMPARE COPIES – MARK WHAT SHOULD BE DELETED
duplicates.compare.empty: Select a duplicate group on the left to compare its copies side by side.
duplicates.status.idle: Select folders and start a scan to find duplicates.
duplicates.confirm.title: Delete duplicates
duplicates.confirm.body:
{0} marked copy(ies) totaling {1} will be permanently deleted.
At least one copy per group is always kept.

Do you want to continue?
duplicates.secureDelete.option: Secure delete – irreversible, no recycle bin/undo
duplicates.secureDelete.warnBody: {0} file(s) will be overwritten multiple times and then deleted. This is IRREVERSIBLE – no recycle bin, no undo, no recovery. Note: on SSDs/NVMe and modern file systems, overwriting cannot be technically guaranteed. Continue?
premium.locked.title: Premium feature
premium.locked.schedule.pitch: Scheduled automatic cleaning tidies up your PC regularly in the background – daily, weekly or monthly, with a configurable cleaning profile and a report for every run.
premium.locked.body: This feature is part of OpenClean Premium (one-time purchase, no subscription). Your purchase supports further development – the core of OpenClean stays free and open source.
schedule.sunset.title: Scheduling now requires Pro
schedule.sunset.body: Your previously free scheduled cleaning has been disabled and the scheduled task removed. Activate OpenClean Pro to keep using automatic cleaning.
premium.activate.title: Activate license
premium.activate.hint: Enter the license key you received by e-mail after your purchase (OPENCLEAN-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX).
premium.activate.privacy: Activation transmits only: the license key, an anonymous device hash and the app version. No telemetry, no account.
premium.error.invalidKey: The license key is invalid or has been revoked.
premium.error.deviceLimit: Device limit reached: this license is already active on the maximum number of devices. Deactivate another device first.
premium.error.network: The license server is currently unreachable. Please check your internet connection and try again.
premium.error.rateLimited: Too many requests in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
premium.error.moduleLoad: The Premium module could not be loaded. Please try again.
premium.module.missingBody: Your license is valid, but the Premium module is missing or damaged on this device. It can be downloaded again now.
premium.batch.locked: Uninstalling several programs at once is a Premium feature. You can still uninstall individual programs for free.
premium.duplicates.locked: Searching for similar images is a Pro feature. Unlock now?
premium.secureDelete.locked: Secure delete is a Pro feature. Unlock now?
schedule.auto.skippedNoLicense: Scheduled cleaning skipped: no active Premium license.
license.sidebar.title: OpenClean Pro
license.title: License
license.subtitle: Activate and manage your Premium license
license.state.free.body: Schedule and batch uninstall are Premium features. Activate your license key or get Pro – one-time purchase, no subscription.
license.state.active.body: All Premium features are unlocked on this device. Thanks for your support!
license.state.expired.body: Your license has passed its offline grace period. Connect to the internet – it will renew automatically.
license.details.heading: License details
license.features.heading: Pro features
license.deactivate.confirm.title: Release device
license.deactivate.confirm.body: The license will be removed from this device and its device slot released on the license server. Premium features will be locked again. You can re-activate the key at any time.
license.deactivate.offline.title: Server unreachable
license.deactivate.offline.body: The license server is unreachable. The license can still be removed from this device – but the device slot will stay occupied. Remove anyway?
license.deactivate.success: The license was removed from this device.
license.deactivate.error: The device could not be released.
schedule.reports.clear.confirm.title: Delete all reports
schedule.reports.clear.confirm.body: {0} report(s) and the text log will be permanently deleted.
schedule.report.delete.confirm.title: Delete report
schedule.report.delete.confirm.body: The report from {0} will be permanently deleted.
integrity.banner.unsigned: This copy of OpenClean is not signed. It may not have come from DaonWare.
integrity.banner.tampered: Tampering detected: OpenClean's signature is broken. Modifying features are disabled.
integrity.dialog.title: Integrity check failed
integrity.dialog.body: OpenClean could not verify its own signature. Please download a fresh copy from daonware.de.
integrity.blocked.action: This action is disabled because OpenClean's integrity check failed.
integrity.auto.skipped: Scheduled cleanup skipped: integrity check failed.
integrity.reason.tampered: The file was modified after it was signed.
integrity.reason.untrusted: The signature is not from DaonWare or is not trusted.
integrity.reason.unknown: The signature could not be verified.
storage.heading: Storage breakdown
storage.subtitle: Which folders use up the space? Click a segment to zoom in.
storage.empty: Not analyzed yet – pick a drive and start the analysis.
largefiles.title: Find large files
largefiles.subtitle: System folders are excluded. Selected files are moved to the Recycle Bin.
largefiles.empty: No search yet – pick a drive and a minimum size.
largefiles.noResults: No files found above the minimum size.
largefiles.column.name: Name
largefiles.confirm: Move {0} files ({1}) to the Recycle Bin? You can restore them from there.
largefiles.confirm.permanent: ⚠ WARNING: {0} of them ({1}) do not fit in the Recycle Bin and will be deleted PERMANENTLY.
largefiles.deleted: {0} files moved to the Recycle Bin · {1} freed
largefiles.deleteFailed: Could not be moved (locked or no permission)
largefiles.protected: Protected system path – will not be touched
largefiles.capped: List limited to {0} matches – there may be more files.
largefiles.deleteError: The delete operation could not be completed: {0}
network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Shows live which programs hold outbound connections – purely informational, nothing is blocked or changed.
network.filter.externalOnly.tooltip: Hides connections that never leave this PC (loopback, listening sockets).
network.filter.resolveHosts.tooltip: Looks up the host name for every remote address. To do so, OpenClean sends each remote IP to your DNS resolver and thus creates outbound traffic itself – the view then shows up in its own list. Runs in the background.
network.note.readOnly: This view reads the connection state every two seconds while it is open. No content is inspected and no connection is affected.
deepclean.title: Deep System Cleanup
deepclean.subtitle: Frees up large amounts of storage. These actions reach deep into the system and are permanent.
deepclean.integrity.blocked: The integrity check failed – deep cleanup is locked. Analysis remains available.
deepclean.status.ready: Ready. Run an analysis first to determine the sizes in use.
deepclean.progress.measuringBefore: Determining initial size … (this takes a while)
deepclean.progress.measuringAfter: Determining reclaimed space … (this takes a while)
deepclean.confirm.title: Confirm deep cleanup
deepclean.confirm.intro: {0} areas will be cleaned, freeing about {1}:
deepclean.confirm.irreversible: These actions cannot be undone. If enabled, a restore point is created beforehand.
deepclean.msg.noFolder: The folder does not exist on this system.
deepclean.msg.shadowNothing: Nothing to remove – the most recent restore point is kept
deepclean.error.dismOutput: The DISM output could not be interpreted
deepclean.error.inUse: Nothing removed – files are in use or protected
deepclean.error.serviceStop: The service “{0}” could not be stopped
deepclean.error.shadowRemove: No restore point could be removed
deepclean.area.windowsOld.name: Previous Windows installation (Windows.old)
deepclean.area.windowsOld.description: Leftovers of the previous Windows version after a feature update.
deepclean.area.windowsOld.confirm: Going back to the previous Windows version will no longer be possible.
deepclean.area.componentStore.name: Component store (WinSxS)
deepclean.area.componentStore.descriptio: Superseded update packages and temporary data in the component store.
deepclean.area.componentStore.confirm: Already installed updates can no longer be uninstalled afterwards.
deepclean.area.shadowCopies.name: Shadow copies & restore points
deepclean.area.shadowCopies.description: Older restore points; the most recent one is kept.
deepclean.area.shadowCopies.confirm: Older system restore points are lost; only the most recent one remains.
deepclean.area.updateCache.name: Windows Update cache
deepclean.area.updateCache.confirm: Windows Update downloads the packages it needs again when required.
deepclean.area.deliveryOptimization.name: Delivery Optimization
deepclean.area.deliveryOptimization.desc: Cached update data of Delivery Optimization.
deepclean.area.deliveryOptimization.conf: The cache is rebuilt; updates will download more slowly for a while.
